description: Adds a working rear pusher propeller to the Chicane, turning the helicopter into a compound helicopter: blade-angle pusher with a turbine-budget power model, manual thrust override, mass-adaptive lateral trim, an improved main-rotor drag model with Ibis rotor visuals, a battle-damage model with bent blade meshes, and a live pusher/turbine/rotor MFD with stock-style FAULT/INOPERABLE indication.
